ideation: This sequence simulates the action of holding and operating a movie camera.  The left arm will support the camera, while the right arm will subtly adjust the focus or zoom. The sequence will emphasize smooth, controlled movements. Frame 1 shows a neutral starting position. Frame 2 shows the left arm positioned to cradle the camera. Frame 3 shows the right arm adjusting the focus. Frame 4 will show the left arm slightly shifting to support the camera's weight. Frame 5 returns to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready to film
left arm extends to hold the camera steady
right hand reaches to adjust the lens
left arm shifts, settling the camera's weight
both arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
